# Gander: R package for code completion

<!-- source: 03-set-up.qmd, section "Gander: Rstudio friendly alternative to copilot {#sec-gander}"; add link https://posit.co/blog/introducing-gander -->

Setting up and using Gander, an RStudio-native alternative to Copilot that can see inside your R objects.

::: {.callout-important title="Challenge" appearance="simple"}
TODO: challenge using Gander on a `dat` object from the benthic/fish data.
:::
